professional_summary: Experienced Full Stack Developer with 5+ years of expertise in building scalable web applications using modern technologies. Proven track record of delivering high-quality solutions and collaborating effectively with cross-functional teams.

description: Led development of microservices architecture using Node.js, Docker, and Kubernetes, improving system scalability by 60%
Implemented real-time data processing pipeline using Apache Kafka, handling 1M+ events per day
Optimized database queries and API responses, reducing average load time from 2s to 500ms (75% improvement)
Mentored 3 junior developers and conducted comprehensive code reviews to maintain code quality standards
Architected CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions, reducing deployment time from 30min to 5min
Developed 40+ React components and implemented responsive UI designs using TailwindCSS
Built RESTful and GraphQL APIs using Express.js and Apollo Server
Implemented authentication and authorization systems using JWT and OAuth 2.0
Collaborated with design team to translate Figma mockups into pixel-perfect implementations
Reduced bundle size by 45% through code splitting and lazy loading optimization

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
education.details: Relevant Coursework: Data Structures, Algorithms, Web Development, Database Systems, Computer Networks
